description: Executive-level resume with extensive experience and leadership focus — tests handling of large, complex resumes
summary: Engineering executive with 15+ years of experience leading high-growth engineering organizations from 10 to 200+ engineers. Track record of scaling SaaS platforms to $100M+ ARR. Expertise in organizational design, engineering strategy, and building inclusive engineering cultures. PhD in Computer Science with 20+ publications.

workExperience.title: VP of Engineering
description: Lead 180-person engineering organization across Platform, Product, Data, and SRE teams
Drove platform reliability from 99.5% to 99.99% through SRE transformation and chaos engineering program
Scaled annual recurring revenue from $30M to $120M while maintaining gross margin of 78%
Established engineering career ladder, performance review process, and mentorship program — reduced attrition from 25% to 8%
Led acquisition integration of 2 startups (30 engineers total), completed within 90 days each
Championed diversity initiatives: 45% of engineering managers are from underrepresented groups

workExperience.title: Senior Director of Engineering
description: Managed 80 engineers across 5 teams building a real-time data processing platform serving 500+ enterprise customers
Led re-architecture from monolith to event-driven microservices, improving deployment velocity 4x
Reduced infrastructure costs by $3M/year through workload right-sizing and spot instance adoption
Launched managed service offering on AWS Marketplace, generating $15M in new revenue in first year

workExperience.title: Engineering Manager → Director of Engineering
description: Promoted from manager (8 engineers) to director (45 engineers) over 4 years
Built the search relevance team from scratch, improving NDCG scores by 22%
Led ML infrastructure migration from on-premise to cloud, reducing training pipeline runtime by 60%

workExperience.title: Senior Software Engineer
description: Tech lead for Google News personalization, serving 100M+ daily active users
Designed and launched collaborative filtering algorithm that increased click-through rate by 15%
Filed 3 patents in recommendation systems and natural language processing

education.description: Thesis: 'Scalable Collaborative Filtering for Large-Scale Recommendation Systems.' Advisor: Prof. John Smith. 15+ publications, 2000+ citations.

education.degree: B.S. Computer Science & Mathematics (summa cum laude)
education.description: GPA 4.0/4.0. Phi Beta Kappa. Undergraduate thesis on distributed graph algorithms.

description: Weekly newsletter on engineering management reaching 15K subscribers
Published 200+ articles on hiring, team structure, and technical strategy
